title: Fillet of Beef on Bruschetta
ingredients: Beef tenderloin, cooked rare and thinly sliced (or Boar's Head rare roast beef)
instructions: Place herbs in food processor and pulse.
Add softened butter until well combined to make herb butter.
Spread herb butter on baguette slices.
Toast baguette slices lightly under broiler.
Top each baguette slice with a slice of beef and watercress.
notes: The recipe suggests using Boar's Head rare roast beef as a convenient alternative to cooking beef tenderloin from scratch.
Season the beef with Maldon salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
